# Sample application descriptions for manual testing
# Each description is separated by a blank line beginning with ---

---
A task management web application where users can create projects, add tasks
with due dates, assign them to team members, and track progress using a
Kanban board with drag-and-drop support.

---
A recipe sharing platform where home cooks can submit recipes with
ingredients, steps, and photos. Users can search by ingredient, dietary
restriction, or cuisine. Includes a meal planning calendar and shopping
list generator.

---
A simple personal finance tracker where users can log income and expenses
by category, view monthly summaries, set spending limits, and export reports
as CSV. No external integrations required.

---
A real-time collaborative notes application where multiple users can edit
the same document simultaneously, see each other's cursors, and view a
full edit history with the ability to roll back to any version.

---
An API rate-limiting and analytics service that sits in front of existing
APIs, tracks usage per API key, enforces configurable rate limits, and
provides a dashboard showing request volume, error rates, and latency
over time.
